visualizerParams.title: Binary to Octal Conversion
visualizerParams.description: Convert a binary string into its octal representation by grouping bits into triplets.
visualizerParams.ghostCode:
def bin_to_oct(s):
    if not s: return ""
    while len(s) % 3 != 0: s = "0" + s
    res = ""
    for i in range(0, len(s), 3):
        triplet = s[i:i+3]
        val = int(triplet, 2)
        res += str(val)
    return res

if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(f"'1111' -> {bin_to_oct('1111')}")
visualizerParams.finalCode:
def bin_to_oct(s):
    if not s: return ""
    while len(s) % 3 != 0: s = "0" + s
    res = ""
    for i in range(0, len(s), 3):
        triplet = s[i:i+3]
        val = int(triplet, 2)
        res += str(val)
    return res

if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(f"'1111' -> {bin_to_oct('1111')}")
